---
title: "Teaching"
description: "Teaching experience of Amanda Loehrke, Ph.D. Candidate in Political Science, University of California, Davis"
toc: false
page-layout: full
---

```{=html}
<div class="site-wrap">
  <div class="site-sidebar">
    <div class="site-photo"></div>
    <div class="site-heading">
      <h1>Amanda Loehrke</h1>
      <svg class="site-underline" viewBox="0 0 260 10" preserveAspectRatio="none" aria-hidden="true">
        <path d="M2 6 C 40 2, 70 9, 110 5 S 180 1, 258 6" fill="none" stroke-width="2.4" stroke-linecap="round"/>
      </svg>
      <p class="site-sub">Ph.D. Candidate</p>
      <p class="site-kicker">Political Science, UC Davis</p>
      <div class="site-contact">
        <a href="mailto:aloehrke@ucdavis.edu" aria-label="Email" title="aloehrke@ucdavis.edu">
          <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.8" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" aria-hidden="true">
            <rect x="3" y="5" width="18" height="14" rx="2"></rect>
            <path d="M3 7l9 6 9-6"></path>
          </svg>
        </a>
        <a href="AL_CV_summer_2026.pdf" target="_blank" rel="noopener" aria-label="Curriculum Vitae" title="Download CV">CV</a>
      </div>

      <nav class="site-nav">
        <a href="index.html">Home</a>
        <a href="research.html">Research</a>
        <a href="teaching.html" class="is-active">Teaching</a>
        <a href="cv.html">CV</a>
      </nav>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="site-main">
    <div class="site-section">
      <h2>Teaching Philosophy</h2>
      <a class="site-pill-link" href="AL_teaching_philosophy.pdf" target="_blank" rel="noopener">Teaching Philosophy (PDF)</a>
    </div>

    <div class="site-section">
      <h2>Teaching Materials</h2>
      <a class="site-pill-link" href="undergraduate-research-methods.pdf" target="_blank" rel="noopener">Undergraduate Research Methods (PDF) <span class="site-forthcoming">(forthcoming)</span></a>
    </div>

    <div class="site-section">
      <h2>Teaching Experience</h2>
      <p class="site-note site-note-sm">Note: * indicates having taught discussion section(s) or lab</p>

      <div class="site-teach-block">
        <div class="site-teach-head">
          <span class="site-teach-role">Teaching Assistant, Graduate Courses</span>
        </div>
        <p class="site-teach-where">Department of Political Science, UC&nbsp;Davis</p>
        <ul class="site-list">
          <li>Quantitative Analysis in Political Science II</li>
          <li>Quantitative Analysis in Political Science I*</li>
        </ul>
        <p class="site-teach-where site-teach-where-sub">ICPSR Summer Program in Quantitative Methods, UM&ndash;Ann&nbsp;Arbor</p>
        <ul class="site-list">
          <li>Regression Analysis</li>
          <li>Introduction to the R Statistical Learning Environment</li>
          <li>Statistics and Data Analysis I*</li>
        </ul>
      </div>

      <div class="site-teach-block">
        <div class="site-teach-head">
          <span class="site-teach-role">Teaching Assistant, Undergraduate Courses</span>
        </div>
        <p class="site-teach-where">Department of Political Science, UC&nbsp;Davis</p>
        <ul class="site-list">
          <li>The Scientific Study of Politics*</li>
          <li>The Rules of the Electoral Game in American Politics</li>
          <li>Quantitative Analysis of Political Data</li>
          <li>California State Government and Politics</li>
          <li>Race &amp; Politics</li>
          <li>U.S. Foreign Policy</li>
          <li>Latinx Politics</li>
          <li>Local Government &amp; Politics</li>
          <li>Judicial Politics</li>
        </ul>
        <p class="site-teach-where site-teach-where-sub">Department of Environmental Science &amp; Policy, UC&nbsp;Davis</p>
        <ul class="site-list">
          <li>Urban and Regional Planning*</li>
        </ul>
        <p class="site-teach-where site-teach-where-sub">Department of Public &amp; Environmental Affairs, UW&ndash;Green&nbsp;Bay</p>
        <ul class="site-list">
          <li>Philanthropy: Civic Engagement Through Giving with Dr. Lora Warner</li>
          <li>Introduction to American Government &amp; Politics with Dr. Aaron Weinschenk</li>
        </ul>
      </div>

    </div>

    <div class="site-end-divider"></div>
    <svg class="site-end-mark" viewBox="0 0 90 12" preserveAspectRatio="none" aria-hidden="true">
      <path d="M4 6 C 20 1, 32 11, 45 6 S 70 1, 86 6" fill="none" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round"/>
    </svg>
  </div>
</div>
```
